titleStmt.title: SII 41.12: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 12. (A.R. No. 12 of 1905.) Kīḻūr, Tirukkoyilur Taluk, South Arcot District.

summary.p: East wall of the central shrine in the Vīraṭṭāṉēśvara temple.

This inscription begins with the praśasti commencing with Tirumagaḻ maruviyaseṅgōl vēndan etc. Records the gift of 4 mā of land (boundaries specified) to the temple, by purchase from the ūrār of Puduppēṟūr, in Kuṟukkai-kūṟṟam, a district of Jananātha-vaḷaṇaḍu by Nārayanan Aranggaṉ alias Sembiyan Chedi-vishaya Muvendavelan, a Kaṇiyar of Tirukkōvalūr, at the request of Kausikan Mallan Amudan, a śivabrāhmaṇan of the temple, for conducting a festival during the month of Mārgaḻi, ending with a recital of Tiruvembāvai on the Tiruvādirai day.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumakaḷ maruviya ceṅkolven=taṉ muṉnoṉ ceṉaipinnatuvāka munnetiren ṟiraṭṭapāṭi Eḻaraiilakkamuṅ koṇṭu kollāpurattu jayastampa nāṭṭi munnāṇai ta
virttu tannāṇai celutti Etirppeṟā teṇṭicai nikaḻap paṟaiyatu kaṟaṅkap perāṟṟaṅkaraik koppattu van=tetir poruta Āhavamallanañcip puṟakkiṭṭoṭa Avanāṉaiyu kutiraiyum
peṇṭir paṇṭāramuṅko
ṇṭu vijai Avipeṣakam
paṇṇi virasiṅāsana
ttu viṟṟiruntaruḷina koppa
rakesari panmarāna Uṭaiyā
r śrīrājentradevaṟku yā
ṇṭu Añcāvatu
jaṉaṉāta vaḷanāṭṭuk kuṟukkaik kūṟṟattu putuppeṟūr Ūrom Ikkūṟṟattut tirukkovalūrt tiruviraṭṭāṉamuṭaiyār Āti caṇtheśura devaṟku nāṅkaḷ viṟṟuk kuṭutta nilamāvatu Eṅkaḷurk kaḷiyak kaḻani kiḻi
ṉattil teṟkitu nila Orumāvum Itaṉ vaṭakkitu nilam muṉṟumāvu Ākattaṭi Iraṇṭinā nila ṉālumāvum viṟpataṟku kiḻpāṟkellai naraciṅkaīśvaramuṭaiyār nilattukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai tirunan=tavāṉap puṟattukku vaṭakku
m melpāṟkellai vāykkālukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Ittevar Āti caṇṭesvaraṟku Ittevar śivabrāhamaṇan kauśikan mallanamutan viṇṇappattāl meṟpaṭi Ūrom viṟṟuk kuṭutta nilam
taṭi Oṉṟināl nila muṉṟumāvukku teṟkumivicain=ta perunāṉkellaiyuḷ Akappaṭṭanilam nāṉkumāvumm Emmilicain=tavilai dravyamumiṟai dravyamumaṟakkoṇṭu vilaiyaṟa viṟṟo minnilattāl van=tanirkkaraiyum veṭṭi veti
ṉaiyumaṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭituṅ kāttūṭṭak kaṭavomānom putupeṟūr Ūrom Innilam koṇṭu mārkaḻit tiruvātiraināḷolakkamāy tiruvempāvai keṭṭaruḷi dittaRead tīrttam prasādittu perun=tiru Amutu ceytaruḷi ti
ruvuṇāḻiyārkkum peṇ
ṭukaḷukkum niman=takāṟṟku pa
ricaṭṭa prasādañ ceytaru
ḷa ceyvittān tirukkova
lūr kaṇiyar nārāyaṇan A
raṅkanāna cempiyan ceti vi
ṣaiya muven=taveḷān I
tu panmāyeśvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 41.12 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
